title: Mapping Synapses by Conjugate Light-Electron Array Tomography
abstract: Conjugate array tomography integrates immunofluorescence and EM imaging in voxel-conjugate fashion, enabling simultaneous molecular and ultrastructural characterization of individual synapses.
notes: Cross-listed from smith/smith-2015-conjugate-at.json. Collman is first author on this conjugate array tomography paper.
